subject: News regarding linux versions of WARP
body:
Dear fellow WARP/M users and Dimitry,

Does any of you have news regarding progress on Linux versions of WARP?
Perhaps Dimitry or some of you already started testing with beta versions?

I read a few of you in the group managed to get WARP/Wine going, anyone got
to run it more or less stably? If possible we'd greatly appreciate it if
you could share more of your setup information!

Thank you so much!

Cheers,

Cyan Ching

PhD student

The Physical Chemistry Curie Lab
